title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-Dome-Ultra, UniFi Video Camera G5 Dome Ultra, black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Dome
description: UVC-G5-Dome-Ultra is a 5th generation camera from the UniFi Video series. It features a 1/2.4" CMOS sensor with a resolution of 4MP (2688 x 1512 px, 16:9) @ 30 FPS . The fixed lens offers a field of view of 102.4° horizontally , 54.9° vertically, and 120.6° diagonally. The camera is equipped with a (1) 10/100Mbps Ethernet port, which provides power to the camera using PoE 802.3af or passive PoE with an input voltage of 37 - 57 V DC . For night mode, the camera is equipped with an IR… Camera (2) Metal bracket Set of screws and metric nuts Set of screws and wall plugs Drilling template Safety pin
